summary: brokerage routes RunE uses an if/else-if chain over UnifiedRoutes/BrowserRoutes/Routes, and config.AuthHeader drops a redundant second empty-token check.
reason: Greptile P2: the routes RunE always called Routes() first and swallowed its error before overwriting the result for unified/browser; AuthHeader had a duplicate dead `if c.RobinhoodApiKey == ""` guard already covered by the earlier token check.
